title: FiduciaIdempotency
description: Idempotency-key payloads for webhook dedupe and retry-safe jobs/API calls.

IdempotencyClaimRequest.title: IdempotencyClaimRequest
IdempotencyClaimRequest.description: Body of POST /v1/idempotency/claim. First claim for a key wins until the TTL expires.

key.description: Caller-chosen idempotency key, such as stripe-webhook/event_123.

owner.description: Caller instance that is claiming the key. Defaults to anonymous.

metadata.description: Optional string metadata attached to the claim.

IdempotencyCompleteRequest.title: IdempotencyCompleteRequest
IdempotencyCompleteRequest.description: Body of POST /v1/idempotency/complete. Must present the owner and fencing token returned by claim.

fencing_token.description: Token returned by the winning claim.

result.description: Optional small JSON result duplicate callers can replay.

IdempotencyRecord.title: IdempotencyRecord
IdempotencyRecord.description: Active idempotency record retained until the TTL window expires.

status.description: Whether the key is still in progress or completed.

first_seen_ms.description: First claim time in ms since epoch.
